---
name: Methodology question
about: Ask about how FSE is meant to be applied, interpreted, or adapted
title: "[Question] "
labels: question
assignees: ''

---

## Your question

What are you trying to figure out?

## Context

What are you building, what stack are you on, and what part of FSE are you trying to apply? You don't have to share anything proprietary — a sketch of the situation is enough.

## What you've already tried or read

Which FSE documents have you already looked at? What did or didn't make sense?

## What you think the answer might be

If you have a guess, share it. Sometimes the right answer is "yes, your read is correct" and that's faster to confirm than to explain from scratch.

## Stack relevance

Is this question about core methodology (applies to any stack) or about how to apply FSE to a specific stack? If it's stack-specific, check fse-extensions first — it may already be addressed there, or it may be a gap worth filling.

## Anything else

Links, code excerpts (sanitized), or anything else that helps us understand what you're working through.
